description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a dark, weathered plank texture and metallic trim along its edges. The front face features a small, square metal plate with a keyhole, suggesting a lockable compartment. The sides each display a circular metallic detail, likely intended as a decorative element or possibly a mounting point for handles. The back of the box has two small metal hinge plates, indicating that the lid is hinged and can be opened from the front. The top surface is flat and made of the same wooden planks, bordered by the metallic trim. The overall construction appears sturdy and suitable for storing tools, equipment, or personal belongings in an urban or garage setting.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with metal trim, a keyhole lock on the front, and a hinged lid. The box features a weathered wood finish and metallic details on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood plank texture, metallic trim, and a central metal plate with a keyhole.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood planks, metallic trim, and a circular metallic detail centered on the side.
description_view_2: Back view with two small metal hinge plates on the upper edge and a continuous wood plank surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a circular metallic detail and wood plank texture.
